all_required: pair-batched inference is implemented and benchmarked
expected local end-to-end runtime exceeds two hours or pair count exceeds 50000
GPU inference, not pose/collision, is measured as at least 30 percent of wall time
a rented configuration demonstrates at least 3x end-to-end speedup on a representative shard
rental_trigger.reason: The current per-pair implementation is faster on CPU at this scale; a faster rented GPU would not reduce the dominant pose/collision time.

required_before_reconsideration: untouched external holdout with at least 100 engineer-confirmed exact interfaces
at least 1000 geometry-valid functional hard-negative pairs
zero increase in false auto accepts
positive workload-adjusted rescue benefit on the untouched holdout
checkpoint selection uses validation only and test remains evaluation-only
at least three of four seeds have non-degraded test Top-10 and mean test Top-10 is positive
domain_adaptation_gate.reason: Previous domain adaptation did not pass the independent-test promotion gate, and current candidate union already provides recall benefit without retraining.
